title: Stroiketcy

{{Quote|The Yuuzhan Vong entered the Yavin system peacefully. There was already some sort of scuffle between smugglers going on when they got there, and some of those smugglers remain and continue to harass the Yuuzhan Vong water-mining activities on Stroiketcy. It took considerable diplomatic effort to convince them that these outlaws have nothing to do with the New Republic.|[[Borsk Fey'lya]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Conquest">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''</ref>}}
'''Stroiketcy''' was a [[Comet/Legends|comet]] captured in the [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Yavin/Legends|Yavin]]. The name "Stroiketcy" came from a [[Olys Corellisi/Legends|Corellian]] word meaning "tailed one."

==Description==
Like most [[Comet/Legends|comets]], its chemical makeup consisted mostly of frozen water, which covered 93.4% of the planet's surface and had a solid core. Only small pockets of rock reached through to the surface. The core was mostly rock, but also had deposits of [[iridium]], [[heglum]], and [[Malsarr/Legends|malsarr]]. Traces of these elements could be found in the water as well, but generally it was of great purity.<ref name="GG2" />

[[Vanyets]] and [[Tsorria]] were the northern and southern ice caps and the only permanent frozen parts of ice. While during the summer, most of the ice melted and the sea levels rose, almost all water was frozen during the winter. The weather was dominated by rain, storms and fog, which never reached a violent level due to the lack of notable drastic differences in temperature. A small part of the atmosphere "leaked" into space and formed a small, but visible "tail", similar to a comet.<ref name="GG2" />

Stroiketcy's wild, elliptical orbit, brought it within 100,000 [[Kilometer/Legends|km]] of the orbit of the planet [[Fiddanl]] and beyond [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin's]] for a period of time. The distance to the [[Star/Legends|sun]] also dictated the climate of Stroiketcy and due to the resulting "[[Slingshot/Legends|slingshot]]"-effect of the orbit, the summer was much shorter than the winter.<ref name="GG2" />

==History==
Stroiketcy was first charted by [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Scout/Legends|explorers]], who named the planet for the visible tail of leaking atmosphere, which was clearly visible from space. They also named the two poles. Their surveys discovered that the planet was suitable for water [[Mining/Legends|mining]] and, during a certain period in the middle of the planet's orbit, prospecting [[Iridium (element)/Legends|iridium]] and [[Malsarr/Legends|malsarr]] deposits.<ref name="GG2" />

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] occupation of the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]], Stroiketcy was used for the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] of [[Water/Legends|water]].<ref name="Conquest" />

==Inhabitants==
There was a possibility that the comet supported a form of molecular life during the summer period. The early [[Scout/Legends|explorers]] found [[organochrystalline]] structures in the water, similar to the [[rubygrub cyst]] of [[Loth]]. The water had a great purity and only trace amounts of "universal toxins", but these favorable conditions were neutralized by the long winter periods and thin atmosphere.<ref name="GG2" />

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{Imo}}
